meta_title: For Students: testing automation to Solve no design skills (Intermediate Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to testing automation and overcome no design skills. A Intermediate-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: Testing Automation to Solve No Design Skills
content.seo_description: Learn how to use testing automation to overcome design limitations. An intermediate case study using Antigravity and Claude Code for your portfolio.
content.answer_block: When you lack design skills, stop fighting the UI. Shift your focus to rigorous testing automation. By automating your functional testing with Antigravity and Claude Code, you ensure your backend logic is bulletproof, allowing your application to provide immense value through utility rather than aesthetic perfection.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a blank screen, code logic firing perfectly, but the interface looks like a relic from 1998. The 'imposter syndrome' of being a developer without design chops is real, and it’s stopping you from shipping. You don't need a degree in graphic design; you need a strategy that prioritizes reliability over pixel-perfect visuals.

By leveraging automated testing, you shift the narrative from 'this app looks unpolished' to 'this app is functionally flawless.' This case study walks you through building a high-value, test-driven application that proves your engineering prowess, effectively rendering your lack of design skills irrelevant to your career growth.

steps.title: Define Functional Requirements
steps.description: Before writing code, map out the core user journeys. Focus on what the app does, not how it looks.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the following user stories and generate a comprehensive test plan that focuses on edge-case scenarios for a task management API.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create a functional requirements document based on my current project scope'

steps.title: Setup Antigravity Test Environment
steps.description: Initialize the testing framework to support modular, repeatable test suites.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure an Antigravity testing environment with pre-built mock data generators for user authentication and CRUD operations.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'initialize antigravity testing framework in current directory'

steps.title: Implement Unit Tests
steps.description: Write tests that validate individual logic blocks, ensuring your backend is robust.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate unit tests for the authentication service, covering token expiration, invalid credential handling, and password hashing.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'write unit tests for auth.py using the antigravity framework'

steps.title: Automate Integration Flows
steps.description: Connect your services and verify the data flow between components without manual intervention.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create an integration test suite that simulates a full user workflow: sign-up, create task, update status, and delete task.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create integration tests for the full user task lifecycle'

steps.title: CI/CD Pipeline Integration
steps.description: Automate the execution of your test suite on every push to ensure no regressions.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow file that executes the Antigravity test suite on every pull request.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate github-actions.yml to run antigravity tests automatically'

pro_tips: Treat your tests as documentation; a well-tested codebase is easier to explain in interviews than a pretty UI.
Use 'Snapshot Testing' for your API responses to detect unexpected changes in data structure instantly.
Prioritize testing 'Happy Paths' first, then move to 'Failure States' to build true engineering confidence.
Never manually test a feature twice; if you do it once, automate it immediately.
Focus on high-coverage metrics for your core business logic; ignore testing trivial UI components.
content.next_steps: After completing your test suite, deploy your backend to a cloud provider and document the test coverage in your GitHub README to showcase your professional rigor.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting UI limitations define your potential as a developer. Master the art of automated testing and build a portfolio that speaks louder than any design could. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
